name: brainiac
description: Brainiac knowledge-base query for Cowork — read-only access to your dual-vault file-based KB at github.com/<your-github-user>/brainiac. Auto-discovers brainiac data location (canonical Mac path, project-local cache, or shared cache); falls back to auto-clone using $BRAINIAC_PAT (fine-grained GitHub PAT) from the project's .env file.
